PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?locationLabel WHERE {
  ?game wdt:P1545 "7" ; wdt:P276 ?location .
  ?location rdfs:label ?locationLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?locationLabel) = "en")
}

However, this location varies each year depending on which team has home-field advantage (which team's league won the MLB All-Star Game). args.explanation: The question asks for the location of the 7th game of the World Series. However, this location varies each year depending on which team has home-field advantage (which team's league won the MLB All-Star Game). Wikidata does not store structured data about individual game locations within specific World Series editions (e.g., Game 7 venues), as the database focuses on higher-level event information rather than per-game breakdowns. Multiple SPARQL query attempts using properties like `P1545` (series ordinal) and `P276` (location) returned no results, confirming the lack of granular game-specific venue data in the knowledge graph.

best_attempt.sparql: SELECT ?locationLabel WHERE { ?game wdt:P1545 "7"; wdt:P276 ?location. ?location rdfs:label ?locationLabel. FILTER(LANG(?locationLabel)="en") }

question: where is the 7th game of the world series played
